title.en: Custom 130-Piece Glow Fort Kit Open For Private Label Projects
title.zh: 定制130件夜光堡垒套装开放贴牌项目沟通

excerpt.en: The 130-piece glow fort kit uses a space-theme color box reference for private-label and OEM/ODM packaging review.
excerpt.zh: 130件夜光堡垒拼搭套装以太空主题彩盒为参考，适合品牌客户开展贴牌和 OEM/ODM 包装评估。

body.en:
The custom 130-piece glow-in-the-dark fort building kit is now open for private-label discussion, with a space-theme color box direction for customers who need a clear glow-play concept and manageable piece count.

The product is based on PP plastic rods and connector balls with an insert-and-twist assembly method. Compared with a fully open custom brief, the 130-piece base configuration makes packaging, pricing, and channel review easier.

A space theme fits glow play naturally

Glow fort products work well with space, adventure, and night-play stories. A space-theme color box helps customers build the visual direction quickly and gives useful material for listing images and retail display.

If a buyer already has brand visuals, box artwork, logo, manual layout, and color direction can still be adjusted.

A Mid-Size Kit Helps Control Cost And Package Size

The 130-piece base configuration is suitable for an entry-level or gift-positioned fort building set. It is easier to manage in package volume than a larger kit, while still offering a complete building experience.

For sourcing teams, this specification helps review MOQ, freight cost, target retail price, and age positioning at the same time.

Useful for faster private-label planning

The project supports OEM/ODM discussion around box artwork, glow-theme graphics, logo, colors, size, illustrations, and manual layout. Customers can confirm target market and package language before moving into sample details.

Related product

The Custom Glow in the Dark 130-Piece Fort Building Kit product page includes piece count, material, packaging reference, and customization scope.

View product details

Themed Gift Items Need A Clear Visual Direction

The value of a glow fort kit is not only replacing standard parts with glow parts. The box story, colors, and use scene need to create one clear memory. A 130-piece configuration works well for mid-range gift planning with enough build size and manageable package volume.

Based on Custom Glow in the Dark 130-Piece Fort Building Kit, customers can develop space, night-play, birthday gift, or seasonal promotion versions.

Confirm These Details Before Custom Sampling

Item to confirmRecommended inputWhat it affects
Box themeSpace, adventure, sleepover, or brand styleColor-box design, hero images, retail display
Glow-part ratioGlow rod count, color contrast, showing methodCost, effect images, customer understanding
Instruction languageTarget market, age guidance, supervision notesFile preparation and packaging approval

If the customer already has brand visuals or channel requirements, sharing them before sampling helps align product configuration, box artwork, and photo direction at the same time.

Start Private-Label Review From The Themed Box

Yaoshun can support logo, colors, box artwork, instructions, and master-carton planning. Review the product page first, then send target quantity, market, and packaging reference through the contact page.

View 130-Piece Glow KitView Private-Label OptionsSend Requirements
body.zh:
定制130件夜光堡垒拼搭套装已开放贴牌项目沟通，当前参考方向为太空主题彩盒，适合需要夜光卖点和清晰件数配置的客户。

这款产品以 PP 塑料杆件和连接球为基础，采用插入并旋转固定的组装方式。相比完全开放式定制，130件基准配置更方便客户评估包装、价格和渠道定位。

太空主题更贴合夜光玩法

夜光堡垒产品天然适合与太空、探险、夜间游戏等主题结合。太空主题彩盒可以帮助客户更快建立产品视觉，也便于后续做线上主图和零售陈列。

如果客户已有品牌视觉，盒面图形、LOGO、说明书和配色仍可继续调整。

中等件数便于控制成本和体积

130件基准配置可用于入门型或礼品型堡垒拼搭产品。它比大型套装更容易控制包装体积，也比过小套装更能呈现完整搭建体验。

对于项目团队来说，这个规格有助于在早期同时评估 MOQ、运输成本、零售价和目标年龄段。

适合私标项目快速定方向

该项目支持 OEM/ODM 盒面、夜光主题画面、LOGO、颜色、尺寸、图形和说明书版式沟通。客户可以先确认目标市场和包装语言，再进入样品细节。

关联产品

定制130件夜光堡垒拼搭套装产品页包含件数、材料、包装参考和定制范围说明。

查看产品详情

太空主题礼品款需要先统一画面

夜光堡垒套装的核心不是把普通套装换成会发光的零件，而是让包装、配色和使用场景形成统一记忆点。130件配置适合用于中等价位的礼品款，既有搭建规模，又不会让包装体积过重。

以 定制130件夜光堡垒拼搭套装 为基础，客户可以围绕太空主题、夜间游戏、儿童生日礼物和节日促销做不同版本。

定制前先确认这些细节

确认项目建议说明会影响
盒面主题太空、探险、睡衣派对或品牌自有画风彩盒设计、主图和渠道陈列
夜光件比例夜光杆数量、颜色对比和展示方式成本、效果图和消费者理解
说明书语言目标市场、年龄建议、监护提示文件准备和包装审批

如果客户已有品牌视觉或销售渠道，建议在打样前一并提供。这样可以把产品配置、包装画面和拍摄方向一次对齐。

从主题彩盒开始评估私标项目

尧顺可配合 LOGO、配色、盒面、说明书和外箱方案。可先查看产品页，再通过 联系页面 发送目标数量、市场和包装参考。

查看130件夜光款查看贴牌方案提交需求
